title: Future of the Time Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Drake races through time to save a friend before it's too late! ⏳

q.en: Why do Drake and Rori travel to see the Time Dragon?
q.zh: 德雷克和罗瑞为什么要去见时光龙？

options.en: To repair the damage in Bracken
options.zh: 去修复布拉克恩的损毁

options.en: To free Eko and other wizards trapped in time
options.zh: 去解救被时间困住的艾柯和其他巫师

options.en: To defeat Maldred one more time according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 再去打败一次马尔德雷德（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To find a lost Earth Dragon
options.zh: 去寻找一条失踪的土龙

explain.en: Maldred trapped Eko and many wizards inside a wall, frozen in time, and only the Time Dragon can break the spell.
explain.zh: 马尔德雷德把艾柯和许多巫师困在墙里、封印在时间里，只有时光龙能解除这个咒语。

q.en: Who is the Dragon Master of the Time Dragon?

options.en: Bo
Lukas
Berg
Griffith

explain.en: Lukas, a blond-haired boy in a black vest, is Maj the Time Dragon's Dragon Master and is training to be a clockmaker.
explain.zh: 卢卡斯是个穿黑马甲的金发男孩，是时光龙玛杰（Maj）的驯龙师，正在学习做钟表匠。

q.en: What is the Time Dragon's name?

options.en: Neru
Vulcan
Maj
Worm

explain.en: Maj is the dark-blue Time Dragon with red spikes who perches on a special three-faced clock.
explain.zh: 玛杰是一条深蓝色、带红色尖刺的时光龙，停在一座三面时钟上。

q.en: Why does Drake suddenly land alone in the past instead of at Maldred's hideout?
q.zh: 为什么德雷克没有到达马尔德里德的据点，反而独自落到了过去？

options.en: Beezel the Imp changed the clock and blasted his friends off
options.zh: 小恶魔毕泽尔动了时钟，把他的朋友们炸飞了

options.en: Maj made a mistake with the clock according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 玛杰弄错了时钟（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Worm ran out of energy
Lukas played a trick on him

explain.en: Beezel, an imp raised by Maldred, secretly rode on Drake's back, changed the clock, and sent only Drake and herself back in time.
explain.zh: 被马尔德里德养大的小恶魔毕泽尔偷偷趴在德雷克背上，改动了时钟，只把德雷克和它自己送回了过去。

q.en: What kind of creature is Beezel?

options.en: A fairy from the meadow
A small dragon
A wizard from Belerion according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 来自贝勒里昂的巫师（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: An imp from the Isle of Imps

explain.en: Beezel is a tiny red-furred imp with horns and pointy ears who grew up in Maldred's hideout and has magical powers.
explain.zh: 毕泽尔是只红毛、有角、尖耳朵的小恶魔，在马尔德里德的据点长大，拥有魔法能力。

q.en: How does Drake get his Dragon Stone back from Beezel?
q.zh: 德雷克是如何从毕泽尔手里拿回自己的龙石的？

options.en: He trades an apple for it according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他用苹果和它交换（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Griffith retrieves it
He shakes her out of a tree and snatches it
options.zh: 他把她从树上摇下来，一把抢回龙石

options.en: Worm flies in and takes it

explain.en: Drake tricks Beezel into climbing a branch, shakes her off, grabs the stone, and traps her under a bucket.
explain.zh: 德雷克骗毕泽尔爬上树枝，把她摇下来，抢回龙石，再用木桶把她扣住。

q.en: In the past, why doesn't Drake's mother believe his story about dragons?
q.zh: 在过去，为什么德雷克的妈妈不相信他关于龙的说法？

options.en: She is too busy to listen
She says dragons aren't real
She cannot hear him
She is under a wizard's spell

explain.en: In this earlier time Drake has not yet met Worm, so his mother thinks dragons are just made-up stories.
explain.zh: 在这个更早的时间点，德雷克还没遇见沃姆，所以他妈妈以为龙只是编出来的故事。

q.en: What power does Maj have that Drake's Earth Dragon Worm does not?
q.zh: 玛杰拥有哪种沃姆（土龙）所没有的能力？

options.en: The ability to travel back and forth through time
Mind powers over stone according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 控制石头的意念力（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Making plants grow
Breathing fire

explain.en: Lukas explains that a Time Dragon can transport to any place AND travel through time, while Worm can only go to places.
explain.zh: 卢卡斯解释说，时光龙能去任何地方，也能穿越时间，而沃姆只能瞬间移动到各地。

q.en: How does the past Griffith finally believe Drake is telling the truth?
q.zh: 过去的格里菲斯最终是如何相信德雷克说了真话的？

options.en: Drake connects with Worm through the Dragon Stone
options.zh: 德雷克通过龙石与沃姆建立了连接

options.en: Rori arrives to help
Beezel confesses everything according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 毕泽尔全招了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Drake shows him a book
options.zh: 德雷克给他看了一本书

explain.en: Drake's Dragon Stone glows and Worm recognizes him in his mind, proving the boy truly is his Dragon Master from the future.
explain.zh: 德雷克的龙石发光，沃姆在脑海中认出了他，证明这男孩确实是来自未来的驯龙师。

q.en: After Eko and the wizards are freed, what danger still remains?
q.zh: 艾柯和巫师们被解救后，仍然留下了什么危险？

options.en: Maldred has escaped his bottle according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 马尔德雷德从瓶子里逃出来了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Bracken is still in ruins
options.zh: 布拉克恩依旧是一片废墟

options.en: The Time Dragon has vanished
Some evil wizards are now on the loose
options.zh: 一些邪恶的巫师已经逍遥法外

explain.en: Griffith's journal shows that some of the freed wizards were even worse than Maldred, and now they are free to cause trouble.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯的笔记显示，被解救的巫师里有比马尔德雷德更坏的，现在他们已自由，可能制造麻烦。
